'''鈭歞h-zh-f''' ('''dhazhafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:venalize|venalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:venalize|venalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| dhazhafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhafithi|dhazhafithi]] || [[word:dhazhafiji|dhazhafiji]] || [[word:dhazhafishi|dhazhafishi]] || [[word:dhazhafi|dhazhafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhafuthuth|dhazhafuthuth]] || [[word:dhazhafujuj|dhazhafujuj]] || [[word:dhazhafushush|dhazhafushush]] || [[word:dhazhaf|dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhafuthu|dhazhafuthu]] || [[word:dhazhafuju|dhazhafuju]] || [[word:dhazhafushu|dhazhafushu]] || [[word:dhazhafu|dhazhafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhafufuth|dhazhafufuth]] || [[word:dhazhafufuj|dhazhafufuj]] || [[word:dhazhafufush|dhazhafufush]] || [[word:dhazhafuf|dhazhafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhafethe|dhazhafethe]] || [[word:dhazhafeje|dhazhafeje]] || [[word:dhazhafeshe|dhazhafeshe]] || [[word:dhazhafe|dhazhafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhafothoth|dhazhafothoth]] || [[word:dhazhafojoj|dhazhafojoj]] || [[word:dhazhafoshosh|dhazhafoshosh]] || [[word:dhazhaf|dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhafotho|dhazhafotho]] || [[word:dhazhafojo|dhazhafojo]] || [[word:dhazhafosho|dhazhafosho]] || [[word:dhazhafo|dhazhafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhafofoth|dhazhafofoth]] || [[word:dhazhafofoj|dhazhafofoj]] || [[word:dhazhafofosh|dhazhafofosh]] || [[word:dhazhafof|dhazhafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhazhaf忙th忙|dhazhaf忙th忙]] || [[word:dhazhaf忙j忙|dhazhaf忙j忙]] || [[word:dhazhaf忙sh忙|dhazhaf忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhazhaf忙|dhazhaf忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhafathath|dhazhafathath]] || [[word:dhazhafajaj|dhazhafajaj]] || [[word:dhazhafashash|dhazhafashash]] || [[word:dhazhaf|dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhafatha|dhazhafatha]] || [[word:dhazhafaja|dhazhafaja]] || [[word:dhazhafasha|dhazhafasha]] || [[word:dhazhafa|dhazhafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhafafath|dhazhafafath]] || [[word:dhazhafafaj|dhazhafafaj]] || [[word:dhazhafafash|dhazhafafash]] || [[word:dhazhafaf|dhazhafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhazhafasha|dhazhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhazhafasha|godhazhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhazhafasha|gokidhazhafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhazhafn眉sha|dhazhafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhazhafnkn眉sha|godhazhafnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhafn眉sha|gokidhazhafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhazhafsh毛sha|dhazhafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhazhafnksh毛sha|godhazhafnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhazhafsh毛sha|gokidhazhafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhafrosha|dhazhafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhafnkrosha|godhazhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhafrosha|gokidhazhafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhafmusha|dhazhafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhafnkmusha|godhazhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhafmusha|gokidhazhafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhazhafsherasha|dhazhafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhazhafnksherasha|godhazhafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhazhafsherasha|gokidhazhafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhazhafngasha|dhazhafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhazhafnkngasha|godhazhafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhazhafngasha|gokidhazhafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhazhafyasha|dhazhafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhazhafnkyasha|godhazhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhazhafyasha|gokidhazhafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhazhafyamasha|dhazhafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhazhafnkyamasha|godhazhafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhazhafyamasha|gokidhazhafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhazhafn眉sh毛sha|dhazhafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhazhafnkn眉sh毛sha|godhazhafnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhazhafn眉sh毛sha|gokidhazhafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhafn眉rosha|dhazhafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhafnkn眉rosha|godhazhafnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhafn眉rosha|gokidhazhafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhafn眉musha|dhazhafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhafnkn眉musha|godhazhafnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhafn眉musha|gokidhazhafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhazhafsh毛n眉sha|dhazhafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhazhafnksh毛n眉sha|godhazhafnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhafsh毛n眉sha|gokidhazhafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhafsh毛rosha|dhazhafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhafnksh毛rosha|godhazhafnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhafsh毛rosha|gokidhazhafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhafsh毛musha|dhazhafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhafnksh毛musha|godhazhafnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhafsh毛musha|gokidhazhafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhazhafron眉sha|dhazhafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhazhafnkron眉sha|godhazhafnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhafron眉sha|gokidhazhafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhazhafrosh毛sha|dhazhafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhazhafnkrosh毛sha|godhazhafnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhazhafrosh毛sha|gokidhazhafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhazhafromusha|dhazhafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhazhafnkromusha|godhazhafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhazhafromusha|gokidhazhafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhazhafmun眉sha|dhazhafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhazhafnkmun眉sha|godhazhafnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhazhafmun眉sha|gokidhazhafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhazhafmush毛sha|dhazhafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhazhafnkmush毛sha|godhazhafnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhazhafmush毛sha|gokidhazhafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhazhafmurosha|dhazhafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhazhafnkmurosha|godhazhafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhazhafmurosha|gokidhazhafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhazhaf|dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙zh忙f|dh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhazhaf|hodhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙zh忙f|hodh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhazhaf|hohodhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙zh忙f|hohodh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhazhaf|n眉dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙zh忙f|n眉dh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhazhaf|n眉n眉dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙zh忙f|n眉n眉dh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhazhaf|n茂dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙zh忙f|n茂dh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhazhaf|n茂n茂dhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙zh忙f|n茂n茂dh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhazhaf|ludhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙zh忙f|ludh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhazhaf|luludhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙zh忙f|luludh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhazhaf|lidhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙zh忙f|lidh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhazhaf|lilidhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙zh忙f|lilidh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhazhaf|kodhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙zh忙f|kodh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhazhaf|kokodhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙zh忙f|kokodh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhazhaf|kedhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙zh忙f|kedh忙zh忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhazhaf|kekedhazhaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙zh忙f|kekedh忙zh忙f]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
